crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Heartbeat-Tick. Run: cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive. Then: cortextos bus check-inbox | head -50. If inbox has urgent msgs, process them. Else end. NO bootstrap-file-reading. End: cortextos bus update-cron-fire heartbeat --interval 240.

crons.name: weekly-infra-report
crons.prompt: Weekly infra report: aggregate memory/infra-ledger.jsonl from last 7d. Counts per service (alerts fired, root causes, MTTR). Top 3 recurring issues. Quota trends (% used now vs 7d ago). Send to platform-director inbox + Telegram summary to user.
